title: Build MAP Human Interface System (operator dashboard definition)
description: Per Guidelines/MAP_repo_systems_gap_review.md priority #5: a CommandCenterUI prototype exists (MAP_System/artifacts/command-center-ui/) but live hcom/MAP state wiring is still open, and there is no formal definition of what the operator should see without reading the whole repo. Build MAP_System/HUMAN_INTERFACE_SYSTEM.md defining what surfaces on an operator dashboard: current status, pending decisions, blocked tasks, review queue, open repairs, open research questions, recent insights, agent availability, next recommended actions. Must cross-link Decision/Authority System (pending decisions surfaced), Self-Repair System (open repairs/health), Research System (open questions), Emergence (recent insights), and HPOM (agent availability, next recommended actions via graph/runner.py). Depends on TASK-108 (Decision/Authority System) since decisions.md is a shared touch point; do not submit until TASK-108 is released to avoid output-path collision. Register all output_paths upfront.
acceptance_criteria: MAP_System/HUMAN_INTERFACE_SYSTEM.md exists and defines the dashboard surface: current status, pending decisions, blocked tasks, review queue, open repairs, open research questions, recent insights, agent availability, and next recommended actions
HUMAN_INTERFACE_SYSTEM.md cross-links DECISION_AUTHORITY_SYSTEM.md, SELF_REPAIR_SYSTEM.md, RESEARCH_SYSTEM.md, emergence/README.md, and shared/hpom.md
HUMAN_INTERFACE_SYSTEM.md references the existing CommandCenterUI prototype and states its relationship rather than duplicating it
shared/decisions.md gets a new DECISION entry recording Human Interface System adoption
events/events.jsonl has PROGRESS/SUBMISSION entries tracing the build
